name: Generalize and Guide: Decomposing Rewards for Few-Shot Inverse Reinforcement Learning

description: arXiv:2607.17760v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) provides a powerful framework for learning from demonstrations. However, real-world tasks often exhibit substantial natural variations (e.g., picking up mugs with varying shapes), making it impractical to collect demonstrations that fully specify a new task under every possible scenario. author: Ziyi Liu, Grace Zhang
